name: Cornbread
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 425°F. Grease a 9-inch square pan generously. In a bowl whisk together the cornmeal, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. In a small bowl whisk together the eggs, buttermilk, and butter. Add the buttermilk mixture to the cornmeal mixture and stir until just combined. Heat the greased pan in the oven for 3 to 5 minutes, or until very hot. Add the batter, spreading it evenly, and bake the cornbread in the middle of the oven for 15 minutes, or until the top is pale golden and the sides begin to pull away from the edges of the pan. Let the cornbread cool on a rack for 5 minutes. Cut into 9 squares.
